title: Sonic Screwdriver
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Youmay|the drink|the [[Sonic screwdriver|tool]]}} {{Youmay|the Sonic Screwdriver beverage|the similarly-named [[Sonic Servodriver]] beverage}} {{Food |image= |name=Sonic Screwdriver |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found=Across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'' |type=[[Cocktail/Legends|Cocktail]] |description= |animals= |plants=[[Fruit/Legends|Fruit]] juice |other=[[Liquor/Legends|Liquor]] |edible= |inedible= |potable=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|May I bring you a drink?''"
"''Sonic Screwdriver.|A protocol droid and Drikl Lecersen|}} The '''Sonic Screwdriver''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Cocktail/Legends|cocktail]] composed of [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] juice and [[Liquor/Legends|liquor]] that was widely available across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In [[44 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'' to [[44 ABY]]. the drink's textbook recipe was replicated precisely by a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] when the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Drikl Lecersen]] ordered a Sonic Screwdriver while in [[Obridagar's Simulator Palace]], a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] training facility on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Yes, the Dr. Who call-out was deliberate. Yet invisile ''[sic]'' to those unfamiliar with Dr. Who. The best sort of in-joke.|Aaron Allston|{{Twitter|aaronallston|status/223131070659440640|Aaron Allston|quote=@lethargilistic - Yes, the Dr. Who call-out was deliberate. Yet invisile to those unfamiliar with Dr. Who. The best sort of in-joke.|date=2012-07-11|archivedate=20200814200630}}}} The Sonic Screwdriver appeared in ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'', a [[2011]] novel by [[Aaron Allston]]. Allston borrowed the name "sonic screwdriver" from the [[Wikipedia:Sonic screwdriver|all-purpose tool]] used by [[Wikipedia:Doctor (Doctor Who)|the Doctor]] in [[Wikipedia:Doctor Who|''Doctor Who'']]. ==Appearances== *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Conviction (audiobook)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sonic Screwdriver }} [[Category:Cocktails]]
